ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team the player is associated with */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the team */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Arena of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "player_game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game associated with the statistics */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "free_throw_stats" (
  "ft_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each free throw statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the statistics */,
  "fta" REAL /* Number of free throw attempts */,
  "technical_ft_trips" INTEGER /* Count of technical free throw trips */,
  "two_pt_fouls_drawn" REAL /* Count of two-point shooting fouls drawn */,
  "two_pt_and_1_ft_trips" REAL /* Count of two-point shooting and one free throw trips */,
  "ft_pct" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ft_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_free_throw_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shooting_fouls_stats" (
  "shooting_foul_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shooting foul statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the statistics */,
  "three_pt_fouls_drawn" REAL /* Count of three-point shooting fouls drawn */,
  "three_pt_and_1_ft_trips" REAL /* Count of three-point shooting and one free throw trips */,
  "non_shooting_fouls_drawn" REAL /* Count of non-shooting fouls drawn */,
  "shooting_fouls_drawn_pct" REAL /* Percentage of shooting fouls drawn */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shooting_foul_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shooting_fouls_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "two_point_fouls_stats" (
  "two_point_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each two-point foul statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the statistics */,
  "two_pt_fouls_drawn_pct" REAL /* Percentage of two-point shooting fouls drawn */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("two_point_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_two_point_fouls_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "three_point_fouls_stats" (
  "three_point_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each three-point foul statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the statistics */,
  "three_pt_fouls_drawn_pct" REAL /* Percentage of three-point shooting fouls drawn */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("three_point_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_three_point_fouls_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, scout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dashboard that the widget belongs to */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of the widget (e.g., chart, table, metric) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)
